testcase.name: test_doses_list
testcase.failure: tests/backend_test.py:128: in test_doses_list assert len(doses) >= 1 E assert 0 >= 1 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_dose_patch
testcase.failure: tests/backend_test.py:142: in test_dose_patch r = s.patch(f"{API}/doses/{state['dose_id']}", json={"status": "taken"}, headers=auth_headers()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'dose_id'

testcase.name: test_tts
testcase.failure: tests/backend_test.py:238: in test_tts assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"TTS failed: Failed to generate speech: Error code: 400 - {'error': {'message': 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.00126, Max budget: 0.001', 'type': 'budget_exceeded', 'param': None, 'code': '400'}}"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
